final_plan:
#Task1: Download historical sensor data for Chiller 9 at the MAIN site for the week of 2020-04-27.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Historical sensor data for Chiller 9 at the MAIN site for the week of 2020-04-27 in JSON format.

#Task2: Analyze the downloaded historical data to identify relevant energy usage metrics for Chiller 9.
#Agent2: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: List of relevant sensors or metrics for monitoring energy usage of Chiller 9.

#Task3: Forecast energy usage for Chiller 9 for the next week based on the historical data from the week of 2020-04-27.
#Agent3: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency3: #S1 #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Forecasted energy usage for Chiller 9 for the next week.

#Task4: Create a work order for monitoring or maintaining Chiller 9 based on the forecasted energy usage.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: A generated work order for Chiller 9 based on the forecasted energy usage.
